---
title: "Export data"
---

ACE exports project data so you can analyse or archive coding outside the app.

## Common exports

- Annotations: coded spans, source identifiers, coder identifiers, and code names.
- Codebook: the list of active codes.
- Notes: source-level notes.
- Agreement data: long-form spans for comparison across coders.

## Good practice

Keep exported files with enough context to understand them later. Record the ACE version, project file, export date, and any codebook changes made during analysis.
